hero.subtitle: Connect with certified professionals for focused, one-time micro-consultations. No commitments, no waiting — just the right help at the right moment.

howItWorks.title: How MindSpot Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From assessment to consultation in under 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Our AI engine classifies your emotional state, assesses urgency, and evaluates risk to personalize your experience.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm connects you with the most suitable certified professional based on your specific needs.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Have a focused, private chat session with your matched professional — no long-term commitments required.

services.title: Why MindSpot
services.subtitle: Purpose-built for immediate, on-demand micro-therapy sessions.
services.feat1Desc: Our classification engine identifies emotional issues, assesses urgency levels, and performs risk evaluation in real-time.
services.feat2Desc: Connect with professionals in minutes, not weeks. Our platform ensures high availability around the clock.
services.feat3Desc: End-to-end encrypted conversations. Your mental health data is protected with the highest security standards.
services.feat4Desc: Our algorithm analyzes your needs, preferences, and urgency to pair you with the ideal certified professional.

footer.tagline: On-demand micro-therapy with certified professionals. Immediate, focused, and private.
